name: UNIVERSITY OF SOUTH DAKOTA ERBERT & GERBERTS / WOW

violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employee with long hair found loosely restrained. Long hair should be more restrained.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk-in cooler shelving units were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation filters were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
